title: Unity Developer
description: We are looking for a passionate Unity Developer to join our team in Tbilisi. You will write clean gameplay code, optimize performance on mobile platforms, and collaborate with artists/designers to create high-quality games.
requirements: 2+ years of experience with Unity and C#
Strong understanding of mobile game optimization techniques
Good communication skills and teamwork mindset
responsibilities: Implement gameplay mechanics and systems in Unity
Optimize rendering and CPU performance for iOS/Android
Collaborate with 3D artists to integrate assets
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

title: 3D Game Artist
description: We are seeking a creative 3D Game Artist with a strong eye for detail and styling. You will craft 3D assets, environment props, character models, and textures that define the unique visual themes of our arcade and tycoon titles.
requirements: Proficiency in Blender, Maya, or 3ds Max
Understanding of mobile polygon budgets and draw call limits
Portfolio showcasing stylised or low-poly 3D models
responsibilities: Model, texture, and rig 3D assets for mobile games
Work closely with developers to ensure correct assets integration
Establish visual style guides and reference documents
Participate in creative brainstorms for gameplay concepts

title: Open Application
description: Don't see your specific role listed above but want to join our adventure? We are always on the lookout for brilliant minds (QA engineers, game designers, sound producers, project managers) who want to shape the future of gaming. Send us your CV and tell us how you can make a difference!
requirements: Passion for video games and game development
Proactive attitude and strong learning drive
Ability to work in a collaborative, fast-paced environment
responsibilities: Bring fresh ideas and industry standards to our studio workflows
Continuously improve product quality and user experiences
